scenario: Verify that process succeeds with valid file
expected_result: Process operation completes successfully with valid file

scenario: Verify process operation with all valid inputs
expected_result: Process completes and returns success response

scenario: Verify error when file is missing
expected_result: System returns validation error indicating file is required

scenario: Verify error when file is empty
expected_result: System rejects empty file with appropriate error message

scenario: Verify error when file has invalid format
expected_result: System rejects invalid file format and shows format hint

scenario: Verify file at minimum allowed length (1 character)
expected_result: System accepts file at minimum boundary

scenario: Verify file at maximum allowed length
expected_result: System accepts file at maximum boundary

scenario: Verify file exceeding maximum allowed length
expected_result: System rejects file exceeding maximum length with error

scenario: Verify file with only whitespace characters
expected_result: System trims whitespace and validates file correctly

scenario: Verify file with Unicode / special characters
expected_result: System handles Unicode in file without crashing
System handles duplicate process gracefully without data corruption
System maintains data integrity during concurrent process operations

scenario: Verify SQL injection attempt in file — input: ' OR '1'='1
expected_result: System sanitises input and rejects SQL injection in file

scenario: Verify XSS attempt in file — input: <script>alert('xss')</script>
expected_result: System sanitises HTML/JS and prevents XSS via file

scenario: Verify process is not accessible without authentication
expected_result: System returns 401/403 for unauthenticated process attempt
